title: Alive!
description: True story of a plane that crashed in the middle of the Andes mountains with 45 persons on board, only 16 survived!! The few who survived for 70 days did so by means of cannibalism !!! Very graphic, but an extremely good read to find out what us humans will do to survive !! God puts these young people to the extreme test!!
subjects: Survival after airplane accidents, shipwrecks, etc.
Supervivencia (después de accidentes aéreos, naufragios, etc.)
Survival after airplane accidents, shipwrecks, etc
